title: Desirability Brief
description: Written by creative-director alongside creative-direction.json. Captures per-screen emotional tone requirements and visual personality proxies. Read by brand-compliance-agent at Gate 4.

per_screen.description: One entry per screen with emotion target, visual tone proxies, and anti-patterns

emotion_target.description: Copied from ux-acceptance-brief.json for this screen

colour_personality_signal.description: What the creative direction implies for this emotion target on this screen

motion_register_required.description: Required motion register. Screens with emotion_target=delighted must be smooth or expressive. Satisfied maps to snappy or smooth.

visual_tone_proxies.description: Token-level or structural signals that correlate with the emotion target

proxy.description: A concrete visual or structural decision (e.g. 'Uses surface variant, not primary fill, for background')

rationale.description: Why this proxy correlates with the emotion target

anti_patterns.description: What would signal the wrong emotional tone on this screen

brand_compliance_anchors.description: Brand token anchors that brand-compliance-agent uses for emotional tone checks

primary_cta_token.description: Token name for primary CTA colour (e.g. 'color.primary.default')
